assessment.note: She names unclear success measures in the new setup, which strongly signals strain from ambiguity; also reveals a clarity issue worth carrying into support.

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What support would make the biggest difference for you right now?
new_queue.description: Gives her an easy way to name help she has not asked for yet.

new_queue.label: Next step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we have covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a near-term choice without opening new threads.
